emails.subject: deal 534056
emails.body: deal 534056 Can you change the time zone to PPT so that the strips accurately splits the zime change for April. The first strip should be 4/1 4/1 M-S PDT 07-22 The next strip should be 4/2 4/30 M-S PDT 07-22 Thanks!
